candidates.why: Separate operating expense line at the same level as Materials and services, not labelled as COGS/cost of sales and therefore not clearly attributable to the selected COGS bucket.
Component of the D&A summary line, but not specifically tied to COGS; using it would also risk double counting versus the summary row.
Component of the D&A summary line, not labelled as COGS-related and subordinate to the broader D&A total.

variables.notes: Selected COGS bucket is only 'Materials and services'. The visible D&A rows are standalone operating lines and are not identified as cost-of-sales/COGS depreciation or amortisation. To avoid unsupported allocation and double counting, no COGS-specific D&A row is added.

candidates.why: Explicit standalone operating D&A line above financial items, at the same hierarchical level as SG&A rather than nested within it. Relative to the selected SG&A row, this indicates D&A is separate and should be added later using the summary row.
Component of the D&A summary row. Do not use if the summary row is selected, to avoid double counting.
Component of the D&A summary row. Inferior to the summary row for later add-back because it is incomplete on its own.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets
candidates.why: Another component of total D&A, but narrower than the summary and should not be added alongside it.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket is 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses'. The separate 'Depreciation and amortization' line appears outside and alongside that selected SG&A row, so it is not already embedded in the selected parent bucket. Per the summary-vs-components rule, only the total D&A row is chosen, not its components.
